title: Exposure: Detective
description: Addon for Exposure that introduces detective tools
body:
![Ink: Draw on photos using ink of various colors.  Board: Pin photos to a board and connect them with strings.  Magnifier: Discover hidden texts written with invisible ink using a magnifying glass.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2e19048846a75605ea836821cd74418ccf0d4c6.png)
## Ink
Hold the ink in your off-hand and the photo in your main hand. Start drawing by using Right-Click.

## Magnifying Glass
Hold it in your off-hand and the photo in your main hand (or click on a photo pinned to the board). Move the magnifier using Right-Click.

## Board
Attach a photo to the board using Right-Click. Connect two photos with a thread by Right-Clicking while holding red string. Remove photos with Shift + Right-Click while your hands are empty.
